title: South Sea Bubble
description: The South Sea Bubble of 1720 was a financial disaster that shook England to its core. Investors lost fortunes, and the country was left reeling. This is the story of one of history's greatest financial crashes.

topic: East India Company documentary type A Company literally owns a country
title: Company Owns Country
description: The East India Company's rise to power and its unprecedented control over India. Discover how a company became a colonial power. Explore the history of the East India Company

topic: The Dutch East India Company IPO
title: Dutch East India Co.
description: The Dutch East India Company's IPO revolutionized finance and changed the course of history. Learn how this pioneering company raised capital and expanded its reach. Discover the impact of the Dutch East India Company's innovative approach to finance.

topic: East India Company documentary type A Company literally owns a country
title: Company Rules
description: Discover the East India Company, a corporation that once owned and governed India. Learn how this powerful company rose to dominance and its lasting impact on global trade and politics. From its humble beginnings to its eventual demise, this is the story of the East India Company.

topic: The first stock exchange in Amsterdam
title: Amsterdam's Birthplace
description: Discover the origins of the world's first stock exchange in Amsterdam, a city that pioneered modern finance. Learn how this innovative marketplace shaped the global economy. From humble beginnings to a financial powerhouse, Amsterdam's story is one of ingenuity and progress.

title: Tulip Mania
description: In 1637, a rare flower sparked a frenzy that would change the course of history. The tulip mania bubble was a financial phenomenon that engulfed the Netherlands, leaving a trail of devastation in its wake. Join us as we explore the events that led to this catastrophic bubble.

title: Tulip Mania
description: Discover the fascinating story of the tulip mania bubble of 1637, one of the first recorded economic bubbles in history. Learn how a rare flower became a symbol of wealth and status, and how its value skyrocketed before collapsing. Join us as we explore this intriguing episode in financial history.

title: Tulip Mania
description: Explore the first recorded economic bubble in history, the tulip mania of 1637, where tulip bulbs became a coveted commodity in the Netherlands. This phenomenon led to extreme speculation and eventual financial collapse. Learn about the causes and consequences of this historic event.

topic: East India Company documentary type A Company literally owns a country
title: ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی
description: ایک کمپنی جس نے ایک پورا ملک اپنا غلام بنا دیا، ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی کی کہانی سنیے۔ اس کمپنی نے ہندوستان پر اپنا تسلط قائم کیا اور برطانیہ کی طاقت کا ایک اہم ذریعہ بنا۔

topic: East India Company documentary type A Company literally owns a country
title: ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی
description: ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی کی کہانی، جس نے ایک پوری ملک کو اپنے قبضے میں کر لیا۔ یہ کمپنی کس طرح بھارت میں اقتدار کی چوٹی پر پہنچ گئی؟ دیکھیے یہ دستاویزی فلم۔ ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی کی تاریخ کا انکشاف

topic: East India Company documentary type A Company literally owns a country
title: ایک کمپنی جو ملک کی مالک
description: برطانیہ کی ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی نے بھارت پر قبضہ کر لیا، ایک کمپنی کی کہانی جو ایک پورے ملک کی مالک بن گئی۔ اس دستاویزی فلم میں ہم آپ کو اس کمپنی کی تاریخ اور اس کے اثرات کے بارے میں بتائیں گے۔
